intent_tree: {"处理一个mp3文件并确保其清晰可听，同时将语音转为文字并标记主要句子": {"选择要处理的音频文件": {}, "确保音频文件清晰可听": {"降噪处理": {}, "音量标准化": {}}, "将语音转为文字": {"使用语音识别模型提取文字": {}, "标记主要句子和时间戳": {}}}}
task_graph: {"nodes": [{"id": "Node1", "description": "读取输入的mp3音频文件"}, {"id": "Node2", "description": "将音频文件转换为numpy数组以进行处理"}, {"id": "Node3", "description": "使用noisereduce库对音频进行降噪处理"}, {"id": "Node4", "description": "将降噪后的音频重新封装为AudioSegment对象"}, {"id": "Node5", "description": "对音频进行音量标准化（调整至-20dBFS）"}, {"id": "Node6", "description": "将处理后的音频导出为WAV格式文件"}, {"id": "Node7", "description": "加载Whisper语音识别模型"}, {"id": "Node8", "description": "使用Whisper模型对音频进行语音识别"}, {"id": "Node9", "description": "提取带时间戳的语音识别结果"}, {"id": "Node10", "description": "格式化转录结果，包括编号、时间戳和文本"}, {"id": "Node11", "description": "将格式化后的转录结果保存到文本文件"}], "links": [{"source": "Node1", "target": "Node2", "type": "convertToArray"}, {"source": "Node2", "target": "Node3", "type": "denoise"}, {"source": "Node3", "target": "Node4", "type": "reconstructAudio"}, {"source": "Node4", "target": "Node5", "type": "normalizeVolume"}, {"source": "Node5", "target": "Node6", "type": "exportProcessedAudio"}, {"source": "Node6", "target": "Node7", "type": "loadModel"}, {"source": "Node7", "target": "Node8", "type": "transcribeAudio"}, {"source": "Node8", "target": "Node9", "type": "extractTimestamps"}, {"source": "Node9", "target": "Node10", "type": "formatTranscript"}, {"source": "Node10", "target": "Node11", "type": "saveToFile"}]}
mapping: {"处理一个mp3文件并确保其清晰可听，同时将语音转为文字并标记主要句子": {"nodes": ["Node1", "Node2", "Node3", "Node4", "Node5", "Node6", "Node7", "Node8", "Node9", "Node10", "Node11"]}, "选择要处理的音频文件": {"nodes": ["Node1"]}, "确保音频文件清晰可听": {"nodes": ["Node2", "Node3", "Node4", "Node5", "Node6"]}, "降噪处理": {"nodes": ["Node2", "Node3", "Node4"]}, "音量标准化": {"nodes": ["Node4", "Node5", "Node6"]}, "将语音转为文字": {"nodes": ["Node7", "Node8", "Node9", "Node10", "Node11"]}, "使用语音识别模型提取文字": {"nodes": ["Node7", "Node8", "Node9"]}, "标记主要句子和时间戳": {"nodes": ["Node9", "Node10", "Node11"]}}
